items.definition_en: Parmesan is a hard, aged Italian cheese with a strong flavor.
items.example_en: She sprinkled parmesan on her pasta.

items.definition_en: Brie is a soft French cheese with a white rind.
items.example_en: They served brie with crackers at the party.

items.definition_en: Blue cheese is a cheese with blue mold veins and a strong taste.
items.example_en: He added blue cheese to his salad.

items.definition_en: Camembert is a creamy, soft French cheese with a white rind.
items.example_en: Camembert tastes best at room temperature.

items.definition_en: Mascarpone is a rich, creamy Italian cheese often used in desserts.
items.example_en: Tiramisu is made with mascarpone.

items.definition_en: Cheddar is a firm yellow or white cheese with a sharp flavor.
items.example_en: She likes cheddar on her sandwiches.

items.definition_en: Quark is a fresh dairy product similar to soft cheese or thick yogurt.
items.example_en: He mixes fruit with quark for breakfast.

items.definition_en: Evaporated milk is canned milk with some water removed.
items.example_en: She uses evaporated milk in her coffee.

items.definition_en: Condensed milk is thick, sweetened milk in a can.
items.example_en: Condensed milk is often used in desserts.

items.definition_en: Buttermilk is a tangy liquid left after churning butter.
items.example_en: He drank a glass of buttermilk with lunch.

items.definition_en: Halloumi is a salty, semi-hard cheese from Cyprus, often grilled or fried.
items.example_en: Halloumi tastes delicious when grilled.

items.definition_en: Feta is a crumbly, salty cheese made from sheep's or goat's milk.
items.example_en: She added feta to her Greek salad.

items.definition_en: Goat cheese is cheese made from goat's milk and usually has a tangy flavor.
items.example_en: I like spreading goat cheese on toast.

items.definition_en: Processed cheese is a cheese product made from blended natural cheeses.
items.example_en: Processed cheese melts easily on burgers.

items.definition_en: Milk powder is dehydrated milk used for cooking or drinking.
items.example_en: She uses milk powder in bread recipes.

items.definition_en: String cheese is a type of cheese that can be pulled apart into strips.
items.example_en: Kids often eat string cheese as a snack.

items.definition_en: Triple cream is a very rich, soft cheese with a high cream content.
items.example_en: Triple cream cheese is smooth and buttery.

items.definition_en: Paneer is a fresh, mild Indian cheese made from curdled milk.
items.example_en: Paneer is popular in many Indian dishes.

items.definition_en: Milk chocolate is chocolate made with milk for a sweeter taste.
items.example_en: He bought a bar of milk chocolate.

items.definition_en: Lactose-free milk is cow's milk with the lactose removed for sensitive people.
items.example_en: She drinks lactose-free milk for breakfast.
